Featured Product

High-Precision Hardware Mold Customization

Custom precision hardware mold for a leading electronics manufacturer, achieving high-precision and high-efficiency production

  • Mold precision improved to 0.01mm
  • Production lead time reduced by 30%
  • Mold lifespan extended to over 500,000 cycles
